name: Feliciana
description_short: Feliciana Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union offering personal loans, auto financing, mortgages, credit cards, and savings products with competitive rates and low fees.
description_long:
Feliciana Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving communities with a focus on personal financial empowerment. The organization emphasizes treating members as family rather than account numbers, operating under a cooperative spirit and common purpose model typical of credit unions regulated by the NCUA.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including savings and investment accounts, auto loans, motorcycle and off-road vehicle financing, boat loans, RV loans, farm equipment financing, personal unsecured loans, share-secured loans, mortgages (through partner Member First Mortgage), MasterCard credit cards, and money transfer services via Zelle. Members can access accounts remotely through a mobile app and website, opt for paperless statements, and utilize CO-OP Shared Branch networks for additional convenience.

Feliciana distinguishes itself through its credit union model, which typically delivers lower loan rates, fewer fees, and higher savings rates compared to traditional banks. The organization emphasizes accessibility to low-cost financial services and maintains dedicated member support through direct contact (225-654-4021) and a mortgage specialist on staff. Their platform includes modern digital conveniences like Zelle integration and mobile banking alongside traditional relationship-based service.

As a credit union, Feliciana's primary advantage is the inherent structural benefits of member ownership—profits return to members rather than external shareholders. However, membership eligibility requirements may apply (not detailed on their public website), and their service area appears geographically limited based on Louisiana-based contact information. The organization partners for mortgage services rather than originating directly, which may add a step in the loan process.
services: Mortgage solutions through Member First Mortgage partner
pros: Credit union model typically delivers lower loan rates and fewer fees than banks, as emphasized on their website
Diverse lending products including specialized options like farm equipment, RV, boat, and off-road vehicle financing
Mobile app integration with Zelle for fast money transfers to friends and family
Remote account access and paperless statements available for member convenience
CO-OP Shared Branch network provides access to thousands of ATMs and branches nationwide
Direct mortgage specialist (Todd Cholevik) available for personalized mortgage consultation
Share-secured and CD loan options provide flexibility for members with collateral or savings
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not disclosed on website—may restrict access based on geography, employer, or other factors
Mortgage services handled through external partner (Member First Mortgage) rather than in-house origination
Limited online transparency regarding specific interest rates, loan terms, and fee schedules
Service area appears geographically limited to Louisiana region based on contact information provided
No mention of special programs like payday alternative loans (PALs) commonly offered by some credit unions
best_for: Members seeking competitive auto, motorcycle, boat, or specialty vehicle financing with lower rates
Individuals in Louisiana/service area looking for relationship-based banking with personalized member service
Farmers and agricultural business owners needing specialized equipment financing options
Credit union members wanting to consolidate financial services with a not-for-profit institution
diagnosis: Feliciana Federal Credit Union is best for consumers in their service area seeking competitive rates on vehicle, specialty equipment, or personal loans with member-owned cooperative benefits. Primary caveat: membership eligibility requirements and geographic service limitations are not publicly detailed, requiring direct contact to confirm qualification.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Feliciana — NCUA-insured credit union in ZACHARY, LA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
